meaning: adj.杩囧鐨刟dv.杩囧害鍦皀.杩囧害,杩囧墿
examples: She didn't worry overmuch about it.
He was not a man who thought overmuch about clothes.
Honestly, Apple just sits back and counts the money, without having to worry overmuch about being editors, censors, or arbiters of quality.
He thought that Japanese-style state-directed easy credit for Korea's chaebol (conglomerates) would allow them to expand indefinitely without worrying overmuch about profits.
Nevertheless, it would be foolish to rely overmuch on any technological or legal barrier to ward off those ever-evolving eyes for very long.
